commands.name: cnc
commands.description: Commit No Claude - Create a commit without Claude attribution, ignoring CLAUDE.md files
commands.instructions:
Create a git commit with the following requirements:
1. Do NOT include Claude attribution (no Co-Authored-By, no 'Generated with Claude Code')
2. Exclude all CLAUDE.md files from the commit
3. Write a clear, concise commit message that summarizes the changes
4. Use conventional commit format when appropriate (feat:, fix:, refactor:, etc.)
5. First run 'git status' to see what files will be committed
6. Use 'git add' with specific files/patterns, avoiding CLAUDE.md files
7. Create the commit with a standard git commit message
